Read `AGENTS.md` first. It is the project overview and navigation entry.

Rules:
- Prefer evidence from build config, source, tests, and CI over older docs.
- Read `MEMORY.md` before changing code and update it after meaningful changes.
- Use `.ai/instructions/` as the rule source; do not duplicate rules here.
- Mark uncertain decisions with `<!-- 待确认 -->`.
- User-facing docs and UI copy default to Simplified Chinese; code identifiers stay English.
